scripts.validate-seo: node -e "const C=require('./lib/seo-checklist'); const p=require('./data/news-posts.json'); let ok=0,bad=0; p.slice(0,5).forEach(x=>{const r=C.analyze(x,{existingPosts:p,currentId:x.id}); console.log(x.slug,r.score,r.canPublish);});"
scripts.build: node scripts/generate-subpages.js && node scripts/generate-article-pages.js && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js
